message.content:
@startuml
participant "user" as User
participant "MobileApp" as MobileApp
participant "BACK" as BACK
participant "DB MobileApp" as DBMobileApp
participant "DB BACK" as DBBACK

User ->> MobileApp: Инициация удаления объекта(ов) недвижимости

MobileApp -> BACK: request: deleteAddress (userId, [addressId])

BACK -> DBMobileApp: request: deleteAddress (userId, addressId)
BACK <- DBMobileApp: response: deleteAddress (success)

BACK -> MobileApp: request: getAllUserData (userId)
MobileApp <- BACK: response: getAllUserData (userId, userData)

MobileApp -> BACK: [обновление временных данных userData]
BACK -> MobileApp: обновление представления клиента

MobileApp -> User: Обновлённый экран

@enduml
